response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and demonstrates strong technical craftsmanship, including AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source contributions, but lacks clear evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy leadership, formal AI research, or director-level impact required for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across languages and platforms
Active open-source contributions in AI-agent tooling and GIS infrastructure
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and share expertise through workshops
concerns: No demonstrated experience in cloud AI product strategy or enterprise AI platform design
Lacks evidence of director-level influence or strategic customer advisory roles
No advanced degree in AI or published AI research to support preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Strong technical breadth and open-source impact
